steps.title: Map the passage structure
steps.content: The text first introduces a trend: companies now offer consumers more chances to buy customized products. It then explains why the trend appeals to consumers and benefits companies, since studies show people will pay more and wait longer for customized items.

steps.title: Use the final contrast
steps.content: The final sentence begins with Still, which signals a challenge: companies may struggle to keep costs low when mass production cannot easily make each product unique. Choice A invents several manufacturing innovations, Choice B invents one company's success, and Choice C invents two marketing techniques. The answer is D.
